title: SourceA Stabilization — 150 items (100 + patch 50)
coverage_note: Patch closes gaps vs Ask-mode weeks plan, remaining orders, portfolio apps, AI runtime, and commercial lanes not explicit in STAB-001–100

tiers.P0: Truth on public surface — deploy, email, no false LIVE

tiers.P3: Integrations buyers recognize — MCP, n8n, hosted demo
tiers.P4: Remaining founder orders — forge, URLs, anti-poison live
tiers.P5: Platform mesh — Portfolio Mail, Cloud Workers cloud-native
tiers.P6: Enterprise & procurement — SSO, SLA, audit pack

tiers.P8: PATCH — All four email inboxes + portfolio account law live
tiers.P10: PATCH — Full landing + macOS app fleet + cloud routing
tiers.P11: PATCH — AI runtime, Cursor paste, webhook security
tiers.P12: PATCH — Commercial portfolio, factories, films, NW1
